title: Ads Decoded episode 4 explores how to fuel your bidding and budgeting for better campaign performance.
author: Google AI Blog

blocks.alt: Ads Decoded episode 4 explores how to fuel your bidding and budgeting for better campaign performance.

blocks.html: Think you need weeks of data before using Smart Bidding? Think again.
This week in Ads Decoded, we’re diving into bidding and budgeting with product managers Kristina Park and Carlo Buchmann — answering top questions and looking at what’s new.
This episode breaks down how to move past common misconceptions — learning periods, strategies for new campaigns and more — to use AI with the right data to achieve your specific business goals.
Check out the full conversation here:
